channel.title: Mistral AI News
channel.description: Mistral AI News — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Physics AI research that’s shaping the industry.
item.description: Published breakthroughs pushing the state of the art.

item.title: Introducing physics AI at Mistral: the foundation for engineering acceleration.
item.description: A new class of AI models that predict the behavior of physical systems, powering the engineers and hardware products of tomorrow.

item.title: Introducing Search Toolkit
item.description: Search Toolkit is a composable framework for building production search pipelines for AI applications.

item.title: Frontier AI LLMs, assistants, agents, services
item.description: The most powerful AI platform for enterprises. Customize, fine-tune, and deploy AI assistants, autonomous agents, and multimodal AI with open models.
